title: Debt management
description: Practice understanding of debt management and the difference between debt counseling, debt settlement, debt collection, and debt consolidation.

assessment_items.question_content:
There are multiple agencies that deal with personal or business debts.

**What does a debt collection agency do?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: combines your loans into one
recovers money that hasn't been paid
reduces the total amount you owe
gives advice on managing your money

assessment_items.question_content:
There are multiple agencies that deal with personal or business debts.

**Who is a debt collector?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: someone who helps combine your debts into a single payment
a negotiator who helps you pay less than you owe
a person who collects overdue payments
a counselor who helps manage your debt

assessment_items.question_content:
After moving to a new apartment, you forgot to update your address with your internet company. As a result, the bills went to your old address, and you missed making the payments. Now, you're receiving calls about the overdue amount.

**Which agency is most likely calling you about this issue?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: debt consolidation agency
debt collection agency
credit counseling agency
debt settlement agency

assessment_items.question_content:
If you have a lot of debt, one of the strategies you may consider is debt consolidation.

**What does this strategy do?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: lower the interest rates on existing debts
combines multiple debts into a single, easier-to-manage payment
negotiates with creditors to reduce the total amount owed
eliminates all debts without repayment

assessment_items.question_content:
If you have a lot of debt, one of the strategies you may consider is debt consolidation.

**Which of the following best describes how debt consolidation can impact your monthly payments?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It replaces monthly payments with more payments of smaller amounts.
It replaces multiple monthly payments with a single, often lower, monthly payment.
it eliminates the need to make any monthly payments.
It requires immediate full payment of all debts.

assessment_items.question_content:
If you have a lot of debt, one of the strategies you may consider is debt consolidation.

**Which option is a common method of debt consolidation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: filing for bankruptcy to clear all debts
taking out a new loan to pay off multiple existing debts
ignoring debts until they are written off
seeking advice from a credit counseling agency

assessment_items.question_content:
There are many agencies that deal with personal or business debts.

**Which agency usually charges fees to negotiate lower debt payments for you?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: debt collection agency
credit counseling agency
debt settlement agency
debt consolidation agency

assessment_items.question_content:
An ad for an agency reads: “Overwhelmed by mounting bills? Let Debt Busters negotiate with your creditors to lower your total debt. Contact us for a free consultation and take the first step toward financial relief.”

**What kind of agency is Debt Busters?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: debt collection agency
credit counseling agency
debt settlement agency
debt consolidation agency

assessment_items.question_content:
There are many agencies that deal with personal or business debts.

**How does a debt settlement agency assist people in managing their debt?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: by offering investment opportunities to boost income
by negotiating with creditors to allow a reduced payment amount on outstanding debts
by combining multiple debts into one for simplified payments
by providing free financial education workshops

assessment_items.question_content:
Many banks and credit unions offer credit counseling. 

**What do credit counselors mainly do?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: lend money to combine all your debts
talk to creditors to make your debt smaller
help you with budgeting and managing your money
collect overdue bills for creditors

assessment_items.question_content:
You're earning a steady paycheck but feel stressed managing credit cards, student loans, and bills. Late payments lead to extra fees, and you struggle with budgeting. You want advice to help with your finances and debts.

**Which agency should you contact for this?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: debt collection agency
credit counseling agency
debt settlement agency
debt consolidation agency

assessment_items.question_content:
Knowing when to get financial help can really improve your money situation.

**Who should consider going to a credit counseling agency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: someone wanting to invest in stocks
a person having trouble making a budget and handling debt payments
someone trying to pay less than what they owe
a business owner looking for a loan
